data.title: Alina Holdings Widens 2025 Loss but Advances UK Property Asset Strategy
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Alina Holdings PLC ( (GB:ALNA) ) has issued an announcement.

Alina Holdings reported a widened group loss of £801,000 for 2025, compared with a £327,000 loss a year earlier, as book value per share fell to 16.9p and cash reserves declined to £447,000, though the group remained debt-free and added £1.6 million of financial holdings. Property operating costs rose while administrative expenses fell, and one property is now classed as held for sale at a £1.2 million valuation, with no dividend declared in line with existing policy.

Operationally, the company increased passing rent at its Bristol asset to more than £200,000 and secured non-binding agreements with two national hospitality brands for its Castle Court property in Hastings, despite a planned sale of the Brislington site collapsing and leaving Alina with a £110,000 deposit. The board is prioritising the redevelopment of Castle Court to accommodate new tenants and convert upper floors to live/work units, alongside pursuing a renewed sale of the Brislington property while maintaining tight cost control and active risk management in a challenging UK property market.

Spark’s Take on ALNA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ALNA is a Neutral.

Overall score is weighed down primarily by poor financial performance (sharp revenue decline, ongoing losses, and negative cash flows). Technicals are supportive on trend (price above key moving averages and positive MACD) but appear overextended (very high RSI), and valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no provided dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ALNA stock, click here.

More about Alina Holdings PLC

Alina Holdings PLC is a UK-listed company on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange, operating as a property-focused investment group. Its portfolio currently includes assets in Bristol and Hastings, generating rental income while the company actively manages lettings, redevelopment opportunities and potential disposals in the UK commercial property market.

Average Trading Volume: 9,470

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: £2.84M

See more insights into ALNA stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

East Star Resources ( (GB:EST) ) has provided an update.

East Star Resources has strengthened its capital base following the exercise of 446,538 warrants at £0.03 each, raising gross proceeds of £13,396.14 and issuing an equivalent number of new ordinary shares. The new shares are expected to be admitted to trading on the London Stock Exchange’s main market around 7 May 2026, taking the company’s enlarged share capital to 550,012,922 ordinary shares and marginally diluting existing holders while supporting ongoing exploration activity in Kazakhstan.

More about East Star Resources

East Star Resources is a London-listed exploration company focused on discovering and developing copper and gold deposits in Kazakhstan. Its portfolio includes a joint venture to bring the Verkhuba polymetallic deposit into production with a retained 30% interest, additional VMS and copper porphyry targets, and a strategic gold exploration partnership with Endeavour Mining.

data.title: Rightmove Continues Long-Running Share Buy-Back With Latest £1.1m Repurchase
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Rightmove ( (GB:RMV) ) is now available.

Rightmove plc has repurchased 257,898 ordinary shares at a volume-weighted average price of 434.9p, with the shares representing 0.0342% of pre-transaction voting rights and all of them set to be cancelled. Following this latest transaction, executed via UBS AG London Branch, the company has bought back a cumulative 554.9 million shares since launching its programme in 2007, leaving 753.5 million shares in issue excluding treasury and underscoring its continued focus on capital returns and balance-sheet efficiency for shareholders.

The ongoing buy-back reduces the free float and can enhance earnings per share, signalling management’s confidence in the company’s long-term prospects and cash-generation capacity. For investors, the latest step in this long-running programme reinforces Rightmove’s shareholder-return strategy at a time when listed U.K. property-related businesses remain under close scrutiny over capital allocation and market resilience.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:RMV) stock is a Sell with a £4.55 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rightmove stock, see the GB:RMV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RMV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RMV is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by outstanding financial performance (high margins, strong free cash flow, low leverage) and a supportive earnings outlook with continued capital returns. These positives are tempered by weak technical trends (below key longer-term moving averages with negative MACD) and only moderate valuation support (P/E ~15.9, ~2.27% yield).

To see Spark’s full report on RMV stock, click here.

More about Rightmove

Rightmove plc is a U.K.-based online property portal that provides digital platforms for advertising residential and commercial real estate. The company connects estate agents, developers, landlords and homebuyers, monetising its leading market position through listing fees and related digital marketing services across the U.K. housing market.

Average Trading Volume: 4,682,834

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £3.3B

See more insights into RMV stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Derwent London Confirms Total Voting Rights at 112.3 Million Shares
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Derwent London plc REIT ( (GB:DLN) ).

Derwent London plc has confirmed that, as of 30 April 2026, its issued share capital comprises 112,297,122 ordinary shares of 5 pence each, all of which carry voting rights and none of which are held in treasury. This disclosure sets the official total voting rights figure at 112,297,122, providing shareholders and investors with the denominator needed to assess and report any notifiable holdings or changes in their interest under UK financial disclosure and transparency rules.

By clarifying that no shares are held in treasury, the company signals full alignment of its issued share capital with voting rights, which offers transparency over potential influence and control within its shareholder base. The update helps maintain regulatory compliance with the Financial Conduct Authority’s reporting regime and supports market participants in accurately monitoring ownership thresholds that may trigger disclosure obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:DLN) stock is a Buy with a £26.42 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Derwent London plc REIT stock, see the GB:DLN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DLN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DLN is a Neutral.

The score is led by recovering financial performance and a generally positive, returns-focused outlook from management (upgraded ERV guidance, leasing momentum, and capital recycling), supported by reasonable valuation and yield. These positives are tempered by weak technicals (bearish trend and negative momentum) and near-term earnings pressure from higher financing costs and elevated development CapEx.

To see Spark’s full report on DLN stock, click here.

More about Derwent London plc REIT

Derwent London plc is a UK-listed real estate investment trust focused on commercial property, primarily office and mixed-use developments in central London. The company generates income through owning, managing, and developing a portfolio of high-quality buildings aimed at corporate and creative occupiers in key London submarkets.

data.title: Subsea 7 Wins Substantial ExxonMobil Subsea Contract Offshore Angola
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Subsea 7 ( (GB:0OGK) ) has shared an update.

Subsea 7 has secured a substantial EPCI contract, valued by its own definition between $150 million and $300 million, from ExxonMobil for a subsea tie-back linked to the Redevelopment 2.0 Likembe Project in Block 15 offshore Angola. The work will be executed through Subsea Integration Alliance, with project management led from Subsea 7 offices in Europe and Africa and umbilical scope handled by SLB OneSubsea in Norway and Houston, reinforcing the alliance’s integrated delivery model, deepening its relationship with ExxonMobil and supporting local capability building in Angola.

Subsea 7 executives highlighted that the award extends the company’s track record in West Africa and other key offshore regions, underscoring the strategic importance of early collaboration with clients to optimise development solutions. The contract is expected to strengthen Subsea 7’s position in the offshore Angolan market and demonstrates continued investment by major oil companies in subsea tie-backs, which can enhance utilisation of existing infrastructure and support more capital-efficient field redevelopment.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0OGK) stock is a Hold with a NOK302.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Subsea 7 stock, see the GB:0OGK Stock Forecast page.

More about Subsea 7

Subsea 7 S.A. is a global leader in offshore energy projects and services, specialising in engineering, procurement, construction and installation (EPCI) solutions for the evolving energy industry. Listed on the Oslo Børs, the company focuses on delivering efficient offshore developments worldwide, positioning itself as a key partner and employer of choice in subsea and offshore operations.

Average Trading Volume: 492,612

Current Market Cap: NOK96.12B

data.title: Silicon Laboratories Shareholders Approve Merger with Texas Instruments
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Silicon Laboratories ( (SLAB) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 30, 2026, Silicon Laboratories Inc. held a virtual special meeting of stockholders at which 78.52% of outstanding shares were present or represented, establishing a quorum for voting on key corporate actions. Shareholders considered proposals related to a planned merger with Texas Instruments Incorporated and compensation arrangements for Silicon Labs’ executives tied to the transaction.

Investors overwhelmingly approved the merger agreement under which a Texas Instruments subsidiary, Caldwell Merger Corp., will merge with Silicon Labs, leaving Silicon Labs as a wholly owned subsidiary of Texas Instruments. Shareholders also passed on an advisory basis the compensation proposal for named executive officers in connection with the merger, while an adjournment proposal became moot due to sufficient votes, and the deal now moves forward pending customary regulatory approvals and closing conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLAB) stock is a Hold with a $231.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Silicon Laboratories stock, see the SLAB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLAB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLAB is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving financials and a de-risked, near debt-free balance sheet with positive TTM cash generation, offset by continued net losses and uneven cash-flow history. Technicals are supportive (strong uptrend) but look overbought, while valuation remains a key weakness due to negative earnings. The TI acquisition announcement is a notable positive corporate catalyst that supports the overall profile.

To see Spark’s full report on SLAB stock, click here.

More about Silicon Laboratories

Silicon Laboratories Inc. is a semiconductor company that designs and supplies mixed-signal and wireless chips for connectivity, IoT devices, and industrial and infrastructure applications. The company focuses on providing highly integrated, low-power solutions to equipment makers and developers serving connected home, industrial automation, and communications markets worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 780,360

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $7.16B

For an in-depth examination of SLAB stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

Hammerson plc R.E.I.T. ( (GB:HMSO) ) has shared an update.

Hammerson has reported that as of 30 April 2026 its issued share capital comprises 532,054,593 ordinary shares of 5 pence each, with 8,285 of those shares held in treasury. The resulting total of 532,046,308 voting rights will serve as the reference figure for shareholders to assess whether they must disclose holdings or changes in holdings under UK and Irish transparency regulations.

The company highlighted that this updated voting rights figure is key for compliance with disclosure rules set by the FCA and Irish authorities, ensuring investors can accurately determine their reporting obligations. The announcement was simultaneously released on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange’s SENS system and on Euronext Dublin, underscoring Hammerson’s commitment to consistent regulatory communication across its listing venues.
